name: r-pkg-dev
description: R package development conventions and guardrail hooks, packaged for per-project reuse. Ships an r-conventions skill (R code, dependencies, testing, documentation, lifecycle, plus agent-workflow efficiency guidance) and guardrail hooks (air-format, R-code anti-patterns, roxygen-docs staleness, pkgdown index, a full-test-suite gate before commit, and an R CMD check gate before push).
